name: Accenture
description: Accenture is a global professional services company that provides strategy and consulting, interactive, technology, and operations services. Accenture drives innovation to improve the way the world works and lives. It partners across more than 120 countries.

highlights: One of the world's largest consulting firms

eligibility.backlogs: No active backlogs at any point during selection or onboarding
eligibility.gap: Maximum 1 year gap allowed; degree must be completed within stipulated duration
eligibility.note: Candidates must not have appeared for Accenture recruitment assessment/interview in the preceding 3 months. Must be Indian citizen or hold valid OCI/PIO documentation.

recruitmentPattern.source: Accenture Official Careers Website and PrepInsta reports

roles.title: Advanced ASE (AASE)
roles.description: Higher package role for top performers in assessment

rounds.name: Cognitive & Technical Assessment
rounds.description: First elimination round. Tests cognitive ability and basic technical knowledge.

sections.name: Technical Section (Pseudocode, App/MS Office, Networking/Security/Cloud basics)

rounds.name: Coding Assessment
rounds.description: Candidates solve programming problems using C, C++, Java, Python, or .NET.

rounds.name: Communication Assessment
rounds.description: Evaluates English language proficiency including sentence mastery, vocabulary, fluency, and pronunciation.

rounds.name: Technical & HR Interview
rounds.description: Combined interview round evaluating technical skills, behavioral traits, and overall role fit.

rounds.name: GenAI & Prompt Engineering Assessment
rounds.description: Evaluation of GenAI fundamentals, prompt optimization, RAG pipelines, and enterprise security (prompt injection).

tips: Pseudocode and technical MCQs are key differentiators in Round 1
Networking, Cloud, and Security basics are important for technical section
For coding, focus on standard algorithmic patterns
Communication assessment — practice speaking in English confidently
Research Accenture's services and recent projects for interview
Be confident in explaining your project
Be prepared to design a RAG pipeline or explain how to prevent prompt injection vulnerabilities.
Mention specific Accenture initiatives you admire
